features.name: queue pop_front in conditional expression with extended width
features.description: Code should include a conditional expression (ternary or if-statement) where the result involves a queue pop_front operation with width extension beyond 32 bits

features.name: ternary expression with queue method having side effects
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional operator where the true branch calls a queue method that modifies state (pop_front/pop_back)
features.snippet:
byte unsigned q[$];
byte unsigned r = q.size() > 0 ? q.pop_front() : 8'b0;

features.name: width_cast on queue operation in conditional branch
features.description: Code should include a width-cast expression (e.g., 100'(...)) applied to a queue pop operation within a conditional if-statement with else branch
